Package com.rays.common

Interface BaseServiceInt<T extends BaseDTO>

  • Type Parameters:
    T - DTO type extending BaseDTO
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    AttachmentServiceInt, CollegeServiceInt, CourseServiceInt, FacultyServiceInt, MarksheetServiceInt, RoleServiceInt, StudentServiceInt, SubjectServiceInt, TimetableServiceInt, UserServiceInt
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AttachmentServiceImpl, BaseServiceImpl, CollegeServiceImpl, CourseServiceImpl, FacultyServiceImpl, MarksheetServiceImpl, RoleServiceImpl, StudentServiceImpl, SubjectServiceImpl, TimetableServiceImpl, UserServiceImpl
    public interface BaseServiceInt<T extends BaseDTO>
    Base Service Interface providing common business logic operations.
    Author:
    Aniket Rajput

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      long add​(T dto, UserContext userContext)
      Adds a new entity to the system.
      T delete​(long id, UserContext userContext)
      Deletes an entity by its ID.
      T findById​(long id, UserContext userContext)
      Finds an entity by its ID.
      T findByUniqueKey​(java.lang.String attribute, java.lang.String val, UserContext userContext)
      Finds an entity by a unique key attribute and value.
      long save​(T dto, UserContext userContext)
      Saves an entity (adds if ID is null, updates if ID exists).
      java.util.List search​(T dto, int pageNo, int pageSize, UserContext userContext)
      Searches for entities matching the given DTO criteria with pagination.
      java.util.List search​(T dto, UserContext userContext)
      Searches for entities matching the given DTO criteria.
      void update​(T dto, UserContext userContext)
      Updates an existing entity in the system.

    • Method Detail

      • add

        long add​(T dto,
         UserContext userContext)
        Adds a new entity to the system.
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO to be added
        userContext - the user context containing current user information
        Returns:
        the generated ID of the added entity

      • update

        void update​(T dto,
            UserContext userContext)
        Updates an existing entity in the system.
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO with updated values
        userContext - the user context containing current user information

      • save

        long save​(T dto,
          UserContext userContext)
        Saves an entity (adds if ID is null, updates if ID exists).
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO to be saved
        userContext - the user context containing current user information
        Returns:
        the ID of the saved entity

      • delete

        T delete​(long id,
         UserContext userContext)
        Deletes an entity by its ID.
        Parameters:
        id - the ID of the entity to delete
        userContext - the user context containing current user information
        Returns:
        the deleted DTO

      • findById

        T findById​(long id,
           UserContext userContext)
        Finds an entity by its ID.
        Parameters:
        id - the ID to search for
        userContext - the user context containing current user information
        Returns:
        the found DTO, or null if not found

      • findByUniqueKey

        T findByUniqueKey​(java.lang.String attribute,
                  java.lang.String val,
                  UserContext userContext)
        Finds an entity by a unique key attribute and value.
        Parameters:
        attribute - the attribute name to search by
        val - the attribute value to search for
        userContext - the user context containing current user information
        Returns:
        the found DTO, or null if not found

      • search

        java.util.List search​(T dto,
                      int pageNo,
                      int pageSize,
                      UserContext userContext)
        Searches for entities matching the given DTO criteria with pagination.
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO containing search criteria
        pageNo - the page number to retrieve (zero-based)
        pageSize - the number of records per page
        userContext - the user context containing current user information
        Returns:
        list of DTOs matching the search criteria for the specified page

      • search

        java.util.List search​(T dto,
                      UserContext userContext)
        Searches for entities matching the given DTO criteria.
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO containing search criteria
        userContext - the user context containing current user information
        Returns:
        list of all DTOs matching the search criteria
